title: YO25 9EN + YO25 9EW, J.S.R. Genetics Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/RP3535MT/T006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: J.S.R. Genetics Limited   Installation name: Haywold Farm Pig Unit and Westwold Farm Pig Unit   Permit number: EPR/RP3535MT/T006   "
